headline: Meta Doubles Down, Reassigns 7,000 Employees To AI Teams While Slashing 8,000 Jobs In Mark Zuckerberg's High-Stakes Push: Report
summary: Meta Platforms, Inc. is reportedly reshaping its workforce around artificial intelligence by moving thousands of employees into new AI-focused divisions while simultaneously cutting roughly 8,000 jobs as CEO Mark Zuckerberg accelerates the company's massive AI ambitions. Meta's AI Restructuring Signals...
